description_long: This is a large, freestanding Traeger barbecue grill with a cylindrical black metal body and a prominent lid embossed with the brand name. The grill features a wooden side shelf on the right, a control panel with buttons and a display, and a spacious lower shelf for storage. The main cooking chamber is supported by a sturdy black metal frame with two large wheels on the left and two smaller legs on the right for stability and mobility. The left side includes a metal side tray for food preparation or utensil placement. The overall design is robust and modern, suitable for outdoor use in parks, backyards, or patios.
description: A large, black Traeger barbecue grill with a cylindrical lid, wooden side shelf, control panel, and two wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Traeger logo on the lid, control panel, wooden side shelf, and side tray.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the wooden side shelf and the end of the cylindrical grill body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grill, the frame, and the wheels, with the side tray visible.
description_view_3: Left side view focusing on the side tray and the cylindrical body, with the wheels and frame structure visible.
